---

Hey, you think you don't have enough time? Think again. After all, we all have the same 24 hours a day to work with. It's not how much time you have. It's what am I doing with the time that makes the difference? In this course, you're going to learn how to make the most of every moment. You're going to learn about the myths of time management. Look, time management is wasteful. It wastes time just trying to manage it. We're going to show you how to literally create time, how to maximize it, and how to make sure that time equals money for you.
